SELECT $N
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = $N
SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = $S
INSERT INTO t (s) VALUES ($S)
UPDATE orders SET price = $N WHERE id = $N
DELETE FROM users WHERE email = $S
SELECT col1, col2 FROM table3
SELECT "column1" FROM "table2" WHERE id = $N
SELECT $S FROM dual
SELECT $S FROM t
SELECT $N, $N, $N, $N FROM n
SELECT * FROM t WHERE x = $N
SELECT * FROM t WHERE x - $N > $N
SELECT a + b, c * d FROM t
WITH cte AS (SELECT id FROM orders WHERE total > $N) SELECT * FROM cte
SELECT id, SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY ts) FROM payments
SELECT DISTINCT ON (user_id) user_id, id FROM events ORDER BY user_id, ts DESC
INSERT INTO t (a, b) VALUES ($S, $N), ($S, $N)
SELECT count(*) FROM users WHERE created_at >= $S::date
SELECT data->>$S FROM users WHERE data @> $S
SELECT * FROM t WHERE x IN ($N, $N, $N) AND y NOT IN ($S, $S)
SELECT * FROM t WHERE x BETWEEN $N AND $N
-- top-level comment before SELECT
SELECT /* inline block */ $N /* trailing */
SELECT $S
SELECT $S
INSERT INTO orders (id, note) VALUES ($N, $S)
SELECT * FROM "schema with spaces"."table with ""quotes"""
SELECT $S FROM t
SELECT e$S FROM t
UPDATE t SET col = NULL WHERE col IS NOT NULL
